tasks.label: Run EduSphere API
tasks.command: dotnet

tasks.label: Run EduSphere Web
tasks.command: dotnet

tasks.label: Kill EduSphere Processes
tasks.command: taskkill

tasks.label: Run EduSphere API A0384
tasks.command: $env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30'; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Run EduSphere Web A0384
tasks.command: $env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30'; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Kill API Process
tasks.command: taskkill

tasks.label: Run EduSphere API with EDUSPHERE_DB_CONNECTION
tasks.command: $env:EDUSPHERE_DB_CONNECTION="Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30"; Write-Host "EDUSPHERE_DB_CONNECTION set"; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Restart API with CLI ConnectionString
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM Tabsan.EduSphere.API.exe; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http -- --ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection="Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30"

tasks.label: Run API via cmd env override
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM Tabsan.EduSphere.API.exe ; cmd /c "set EDUSPHERE_DB_CONNECTION=Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30 && dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http"

tasks.label: Run API via cmd env override v2
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM Tabsan.EduSphere.API.exe ; cmd /c 'set EDUSPHERE_DB_CONNECTION=Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30 & dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http'

tasks.label: Restart Web after identity fix
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM Tabsan.EduSphere.Web.exe ; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Run CourseMaterial DB checks
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q "SELECT 1 AS DbCheck"

tasks.label: Run Db check query
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SELECT 1 AS DbCheck'

tasks.label: CourseMaterial unsupported extension count
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SELECT ''CourseMaterialsUnsupportedFileExtensionCount'' AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM course_materials WHERE FileName IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(FileName)) <> N'''' AND LOWER(CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(N''.'', REVERSE(FileName)) > 0 THEN RIGHT(FileName, CHARINDEX(N''.'', REVERSE(FileName))) ELSE N'''' END) NOT IN (N''.doc'', N''.docx'', N''.ppt'', N''.pptx'', N''.pdf'', N''.txt'', N''.xls'', N''.xlsx'', N''.jpg'', N''.jpeg'', N''.png'');'

tasks.label: Inspect course_materials columns
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = ''course_materials'' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;'

tasks.label: Run updated extension checks
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SELECT ''CourseMaterialsUnsupportedFileExtensionCount'' AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM course_materials WHERE FilePath IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(FilePath)) <> N'''' AND LOWER(CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(N''.'', REVERSE(FilePath)) > 0 THEN RIGHT(FilePath, CHARINDEX(N''.'', REVERSE(FilePath))) ELSE N'''' END) NOT IN (N''.doc'', N''.docx'', N''.ppt'', N''.pptx'', N''.pdf'', N''.txt'', N''.xls'', N''.xlsx'', N''.jpg'', N''.jpeg'', N''.png''); WITH ext AS (SELECT LOWER(CASE WHEN FilePath IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(FilePath)) = N'''' THEN N'''' WHEN CHARINDEX(N''.'', REVERSE(FilePath)) > 0 THEN RIGHT(FilePath, CHARINDEX(N''.'', REVERSE(FilePath))) ELSE N'''' END) AS [Extension] FROM course_materials) SELECT ''CourseMaterialsAllowedFileExtensionCount_'' + [Extension] AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM ext WHERE [Extension] IN (N''.doc'', N''.docx'', N''.ppt'', N''.pptx'', N''.pdf'', N''.txt'', N''.xls'', N''.xlsx'', N''.jpg'', N''.jpeg'', N''.png'') GROUP BY [Extension] ORDER BY [Extension];'

tasks.label: Run post-deployment checks script
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -i "Scripts\05-PostDeployment-Checks.sql"

tasks.label: Validate FullDummyData new demo blocks
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -i "Scripts\03-FullDummyData.sql"

tasks.label: Verify new dummy sample data (fixed quoting)
Git status check
tasks.command: git status --short ; git branch --show-current ; git remote -v

tasks.label: Git pull rebase autostash
tasks.command: git pull --rebase --autostash origin main

tasks.label: Stage repo updates
tasks.command: git add -A ; git status --short

tasks.label: Commit repository updates
tasks.command: git commit -m "Update course material upload, seed data, and DB validation scripts"

tasks.label: Commit repository updates (fixed quoting)
tasks.command: git commit -m 'Update Generate Certificates license filter/search and demo seed to v40'

tasks.label: Push main to origin
tasks.command: git push origin main

tasks.label: Final pull confirmation
tasks.command: git pull --rebase origin main ; git status --short

tasks.label: Run API Updated A0384
tasks.command: $env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30'; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Kill locked API process 40772
tasks.command: taskkill /PID 40772 /F

tasks.label: Run API Updated A0384 Retry
tasks.command: $env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30'; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Kill EduSphere API
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM Tabsan.EduSphere.API.exe

tasks.label: Kill EduSphere Web
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM Tabsan.EduSphere.Web.exe

tasks.label: Run API Updated A0384 Clean
tasks.command: $env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30'; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.API/Tabsan.EduSphere.API.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Run Web Updated A0384 Clean
tasks.command: $env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection='Server=A0384;Database=Tabsan-EduSphere;Trusted_Connection=True;MultipleActiveResultSets=true;TrustServerCertificate=True;Min Pool Size=20;Max Pool Size=500;Connect Timeout=30'; dotnet run --project src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web.csproj --launch-profile http

tasks.label: Verify Degree Rules access matrix
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "tools/ci/verify-degree-rules-access.ps1"

tasks.label: Verify Degree Rules access matrix (prompted)
tasks.command: $env:EDUSPHERE_SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD='${input:degreeRulesSuperAdminPassword}'; $env:EDUSPHERE_ADMIN_PASSWORD='${input:degreeRulesAdminPassword}'; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "tools/ci/verify-degree-rules-access.ps1"

tasks.label: Verify Degree Rules access matrix (interactive terminal)
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "tools/ci/run-degree-rules-verifier-interactive.ps1"

tasks.label: Verify Degree Rules access matrix (local auto-bootstrap)
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "tools/ci/verify-degree-rules-access-local-bootstrap.ps1"

tasks.label: Stage portal guard fail-closed fix
tasks.command: git add src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Controllers/PortalController.cs ; git status --short

tasks.label: Commit portal guard fail-closed fix
tasks.command: git commit -m "Fail closed on portal sidebar guard API connectivity errors"

tasks.label: Commit portal guard fail-closed fix (quoted)
tasks.command: git commit -m 'Fail closed on portal sidebar guard API connectivity errors'

tasks.label: Push portal guard fix
tasks.command: git push origin main

tasks.label: Study Plan runtime target query
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT TOP 5 sp.Id AS StudentProfileId, u.Username, d.Name AS DepartmentName, COUNT(p.Id) AS PlanCount FROM student_profiles sp INNER JOIN users u ON u.Id = sp.UserId INNER JOIN departments d ON d.Id = sp.DepartmentId LEFT JOIN study_plans p ON p.StudentProfileId = sp.Id AND p.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY sp.Id, u.Username, d.Name ORDER BY PlanCount DESC, u.Username; SELECT COUNT(1) AS StudyPlanCount FROM study_plans WHERE IsDeleted = 0;'

tasks.label: Compare StudyPlan counts A0384 vs LocalDB
tasks.command: Write-Host 'A0384'; sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SELECT COUNT(1) AS StudyPlanCount FROM study_plans WHERE IsDeleted = 0; SELECT COUNT(1) AS StudentPlans FROM study_plans WHERE StudentProfileId = ''515FCD71-8576-42B8-BE17-46E6470092B1'' AND IsDeleted = 0;'; Write-Host 'LOCALDB'; sqlcmd -S "(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB" -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SELECT COUNT(1) AS StudyPlanCount FROM study_plans WHERE IsDeleted = 0; SELECT COUNT(1) AS StudentPlans FROM study_plans WHERE StudentProfileId = ''515FCD71-8576-42B8-BE17-46E6470092B1'' AND IsDeleted = 0;'

tasks.label: Verify Study Plan filter demo seed rows
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT ''StudyPlanFilterDemo_Count'' AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM study_plans WHERE Id IN (''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818101'',''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818102'',''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818103''); SELECT ''StudyPlanFilterDemo_CourseCount'' AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM study_plan_courses WHERE StudyPlanId IN (''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818101'',''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818102'',''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818103''); SELECT ''StudyPlanFilterDemo_ByStudent'' AS CheckName, sp.StudentProfileId, sp.PlannedSemesterName, COUNT(spc.Id) AS CourseCount FROM study_plans sp LEFT JOIN study_plan_courses spc ON spc.StudyPlanId = sp.Id WHERE sp.Id IN (''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818101'',''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818102'',''81818181-8181-8181-8181-818181818103'') GROUP BY sp.StudentProfileId, sp.PlannedSemesterName ORDER BY sp.PlannedSemesterName;'

tasks.label: Verify Study Plan filter demo seed rows v2
tasks.command: sqlcmd -S A0384 -d "Tabsan-EduSphere" -E -Q 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT ''StudyPlanFilterDemo_Count'' AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM study_plans WHERE Id IN (''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111101'',''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111102'',''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111103''); SELECT ''StudyPlanFilterDemo_CourseCount'' AS CheckName, COUNT(1) AS [Value] FROM study_plan_courses WHERE StudyPlanId IN (''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111101'',''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111102'',''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111103''); SELECT ''StudyPlanFilterDemo_ByStudent'' AS CheckName, sp.StudentProfileId, sp.PlannedSemesterName, COUNT(spc.Id) AS CourseCount FROM study_plans sp LEFT JOIN study_plan_courses spc ON spc.StudyPlanId = sp.Id WHERE sp.Id IN (''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111101'',''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111102'',''9A111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111103'') GROUP BY sp.StudentProfileId, sp.PlannedSemesterName ORDER BY sp.PlannedSemesterName;'

tasks.label: Stage requested StudyPlan+docs updates
tasks.command: git add "Scripts/03-FullDummyData.sql" "Scripts/05-PostDeployment-Checks.sql" "Docs/Function-List.md" "Docs/Functionality.md" "Project startup Docs/PRD.md" "Project startup Docs/Modules.md" "Project startup Docs/Development Plan - ASP.NET.md" "Project startup Docs/Database Schema.md" "src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Controllers/PortalController.cs" "src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Services/EduApiClient.cs" ; git status --short

tasks.label: Stage all then unstage vscode tasks
tasks.command: git add -A ; git restore --staged .vscode/tasks.json ; git status --short

tasks.label: Commit StudyPlan seed docs sync
tasks.command: git commit -m "Add deterministic Study Plan demo seed, checks, and documentation sync"

tasks.label: Commit StudyPlan seed docs sync fixed quoting
tasks.command: git commit -m 'Add deterministic Study Plan demo seed checks and documentation sync'

tasks.label: Run payments focused dotnet tests
tasks.command: dotnet test tests/Tabsan.EduSphere.UnitTests/Tabsan.EduSphere.UnitTests.csproj --filter 'FullyQualifiedName~PaymentReceiptTests' --nologo ; dotnet test tests/Tabsan.EduSphere.IntegrationTests/Tabsan.EduSphere.IntegrationTests.csproj --filter 'FullyQualifiedName~Payments_GetAll_WithMatchingTenantCampusScope_ReturnsScopedReceipt|FullyQualifiedName~Payments_GetAll_WithMismatchedCampusScope_HidesOutOfScopeReceipt|FullyQualifiedName~SidebarMenuIntegrationTests' --nologo

tasks.label: Run payments focused tests no-build
tasks.command: dotnet test tests/Tabsan.EduSphere.UnitTests/Tabsan.EduSphere.UnitTests.csproj --no-build --filter 'FullyQualifiedName~PaymentReceiptTests' --nologo ; dotnet test tests/Tabsan.EduSphere.IntegrationTests/Tabsan.EduSphere.IntegrationTests.csproj --no-build --filter 'FullyQualifiedName~Payments_GetAll_WithMatchingTenantCampusScope_ReturnsScopedReceipt|FullyQualifiedName~Payments_GetAll_WithMismatchedCampusScope_HidesOutOfScopeReceipt|FullyQualifiedName~SidebarMenuIntegrationTests' --nologo

tasks.label: Stage payments view fix only
tasks.command: git add src/Tabsan.EduSphere.Web/Views/Portal/Payments.cshtml ; git restore --staged .vscode/tasks.json ; git status --short

tasks.label: Commit payments admin-role rendering fix
tasks.command: git commit -m 'Fix Payments admin view rendering when student list is empty'

tasks.label: Apply Render Live License (interactive)
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "tools/Tabsan.Lic/apply-render-license.ps1"

inputs.description: SuperAdmin password for Degree Rules verifier
Admin password for Degree Rules verifier (default is EduSphere147 if left empty)
